+def _harmonic_keep_mask(
+    lags: np.ndarray, spacing_mhz: float, halfwidth_mhz: float
+) -> np.ndarray:
+    """True = keep. Excludes lags near k*spacing_mhz (k>=1) — the CHIME
+    upchannelization coarse-channel comb (400 MHz / 1024 = 0.390625 MHz) that
+    prints a periodic ripple into the frequency ACF. The zero-lag neighbourhood
+    (|lag| < spacing/2) is never masked (that is the scintle region). Mirrors
+    scint_analysis.analysis.harmonic_lag_mask so the driver's fresh-fit path gets
+    the same de-comb the full pipeline applies."""
+    lags = np.asarray(lags, dtype=float)
+    if spacing_mhz is None or spacing_mhz <= 0:
+        return np.ones(lags.shape, dtype=bool)
+    dist = np.abs(np.abs(lags) - np.round(np.abs(lags) / spacing_mhz) * spacing_mhz)
+    near = (dist <= float(halfwidth_mhz)) & (np.abs(lags) >= 0.5 * spacing_mhz)
+    return ~near
+
